columns.name: Tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp of the record creation or update

columns.name: BrukerId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the user who created or modified the record

columns.name: Kundenr
columns.description: Internal customer identification number

columns.name: Hovedkundenr
columns.description: Primary customer number

columns.name: Prodnr
columns.description: Product identification number

columns.name: Kundennavn
columns.description: Full name of the customer

columns.name: Kundeadr
columns.description: Customer's mailing address

columns.name: Kundepostnr
columns.description: Post code of the customer’s address

columns.name: Kommunenr
columns.description: The number identifying the municipality where the customer is located

columns.name: Region
columns.description: Geographical region code for the customer’s location

columns.name: Krets
columns.description: District number associated with the customer's location

columns.name: Betform
columns.description: The form of payment used by the customer

columns.name: Autogrens
columns.description: Automatic limit for the customer’s account

columns.name: Bankgiro
columns.description: Bank account number associated with the customer

columns.name: KundeType
columns.description: Type of customer (e.g., individual, business)

columns.name: Egenfrakt
columns.description: Indicates if the customer has self-pickup privileges

columns.name: KontaktFornavn
columns.description: First name of the contact person for the customer

columns.name: KontaktEtternavn
columns.description: Last name of the contact person for the customer

columns.name: Bransjekode
columns.description: The industry code associated with the customer’s business

columns.name: OrgForm
columns.description: Type of organization (e.g., partnership, corporation)
